description_long: This is a small, dark-colored cabin with a simple rectangular structure, set on a flat, grassy surface. The cabin features a prominent gable roof and a small, covered front porch with visible railings and steps. The exterior appears to be constructed from dark wood or similar material, with a single triangular window on one side and a main entrance door at the front. The window is small and asymmetrically placed, while the door is centrally located on the porch. The cabin's compact size and minimal ornamentation suggest a utilitarian, rustic design. The overall appearance is sturdy and functional, suitable for a single occupant or small group.
description: A compact, dark wooden cabin with a gable roof, small front porch, and minimal windows, set on a grassy base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the gable roof, central entrance door, and small covered porch with railings.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabin and the porch extending from the front, with minimal window visibility.
description_view_2: Angled view highlighting the triangular window on the side and the front porch structure.
description_view_3: Rear view showing a plain, windowless back wall and the overall boxy shape of the cabin.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate pitch and slight overhangs
attribute_window_arrangement: Single small triangular window asymmetrically placed on one side; no other windows visible
attribute_door_placement: One exterior door centered on the front facade, opening onto the porch
